title: Nine Lives Co. — Console Necromancy
description: Console Necromancy. Retro consoles, raised from the dead — hand-worked at the bench. Summoning soon.

hero.subtitle: Console Necromancy — the ninth life, by hand.
hero.lede: Diagnosis, restoration, mods, and the rites of resurrection — every console hand-worked at the bench, never rushed.

rite.title: Get the summons
rite.lede: Drop your email and we'll send word the moment the doors open.
rite.note: Nine lives, zero spam — just one message when we go live.
